prompt: Once upon a time, there was a shy dragon who wanted to make friends.
Once upon a time, a small village discovered a mysterious glowing stone.
Once upon a time, a lonely robot lived at the edge of a forest.
Once upon a time, a curious child found a map hidden in an old book.
Once upon a time, a talking cat decided to leave home.
Once upon a time, a storm changed everything in a quiet town.
Once upon a time, a tiny spaceship landed in a farmer's field.
Once upon a time, a baker accidentally created a magical cake.
Once upon a time, a boy discovered he could hear the thoughts of birds.
Once upon a time, a door appeared in the middle of the playground.
A robot woke up and realized it could dream.
A cat found a secret door behind the refrigerator.
A girl opened a letter that predicted tomorrow.
A boy built a machine that could pause time.
A dog suddenly began speaking in complete sentences.
A teacher discovered that one student never cast a shadow.
A small town started receiving messages from the future.
A child woke up and everything was made of candy.
A scientist accidentally shrank herself to the size of an ant.
A family moved into a house that changed shape every night.
Write a story in exactly five sentences about a lost key.
Write a short story under 120 words about a brave mouse.
Write a story that ends with the sentence: 'And that was the last time they saw the moon.'
Write a story where the main character learns an important lesson.
Write a story that takes place entirely inside a library.
Write a story without using the word 'magic'.
Write a story that includes a secret message hidden in plain sight.
Write a story told from the perspective of a tree.
Write a story where the weather changes the plot.
Write a story that begins with a problem and ends with hope.
